mapper.insert: insert into alarm_stop_side_effect_event (alarm_id, alarm_cid, table_suffix, effect_type, payload_json, effect_status, retry_count, last_error, created_time, updated_time) values (#{alarmId}, #{alarmCid}, #{tableSuffix}, #{effectType}, #{payloadJson}, 'PENDING', 0, null, now(), now()) on duplicate key update payload_json = values(payload_json), effect_status = if(effect_status = 'DONE', effect_status, 'PENDING'), last_error = if(effect_status = 'DONE', last_error, null), updated_time = now()
mapper.select: select * from alarm_stop_side_effect_event where effect_status = 'PENDING' order by created_time, id limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update alarm_stop_side_effect_event set effect_status = 'DONE', updated_time = now() where id = #{id}

update alarm_stop_side_effect_event set effect_status = 'DONE', updated_time = now() where id in
#{id}
update alarm_stop_side_effect_event set retry_count = retry_count + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_time = now() where id = #{id} and effect_status = 'PENDING'
update alarm_stop_side_effect_event set effect_status = 'FAILED', retry_count = retry_count + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_time = now() where id = #{id} and effect_status = 'PENDING'
